name: Taiglach K.g.
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, combine the sifted flour, salt, and baking powder.
2. Make a well in the center of the dry ingredients and add the 4 eggs, 1/4 cup oil, almond meal, raisins, and crushed nuts.
3. Mix together with a wooden spoon until a dough forms.
4. Using floured hands, roll small portions of dough into pencil-thick strips.
5. Tie each strip into a knot and tuck the ends under to secure them.
6. Drop the dough knots into a pot of boiling syrup made from 1 lb honey (from a jar), sugar, and 1/2 cup water.
7. Cook for 20 minutes or until browned. Remove with a slotted spoon and transfer to a side container.
8. Stir in 1 teaspoon ginger before serving.
Note: Do not burn the dough knots; gently cook them in boiling syrup.
